name: Summon Beast

components.materialDescription: a feather, tuft of fur, and fish tail inside a gilded acorn worth 200+ GP

placementEligibility.notes: Summon Beast manifests the Bestial Spirit in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range.

effects.description: Summon one Bestial Spirit in a visible unoccupied space within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with concentration, choosing Air, Land, or Water form. The spirit is an ally, shares your Initiative count but acts immediately after you, obeys verbal commands with no action required, Dodges and uses movement to avoid danger without commands, disappears at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends, and uses the slot level for AC, Air/Land/Water Hit Points, movement traits, Rend damage, and half-slot-level rounded-down Rend attacks.

scaling.customFormula: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Bestial Spirit stat block: AC is 11 + spell level, HP is 20 for Air or 30 for Land/Water plus 5 for each spell level above 2, Rend damage is 1d8 + 4 + spell level, and the spirit makes half the spell level rounded down Rend attacks.

conditionalEndings.description: The bestial spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summon.objectDescription: Bestial Spirit ally that shares the caster's initiative, acts immediately after the caster, obeys verbal commands with no caster action, and uses Rend as its combat action.

spellLevelScaling.hitPoints: 20 Air or 30 Land/Water + 5 per spell slot level above 2

specialActions.name: Rend
specialActions.description: Melee spell attack, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 4 + the spell's level Piercing damage. The spirit makes a number of Rend attacks equal to half the spell's level, rounded down.

attackRollModifier.condition: At least one spirit ally is within 5 feet of the target and is not Incapacitated.
attackRollModifier.notes: Land and Water forms use Pack Tactics to gain Advantage on Rend attack rolls when the ally-position condition is met.

lifecycle.statScaling: AC equals 11 plus spell slot level; HP is 20 for Air or 30 for Land/Water plus 5 per spell slot level above 2

communication.languageEntry: Understands the languages the caster knows
communication.commandChannel: verbal commands with no action required
communication.noCommandBehavior: Dodges and avoids danger when no command is given
communication.notes: Bestial Spirit understands but does not gain a speech channel from the spell data.

actionPermissions.notes: The Bestial Spirit obeys verbal commands with no caster action and uses its own Rend action through the controlled-summon command cadence.

formTraits.name: Flyby
formTraits.notes: Air form movement leaving enemy reach does not provoke Opportunity Attacks.

formTraits.name: Pack Tactics
formTraits.notes: Land and Water forms keep normal opportunity-attack exposure and use separate attack-roll modifier metadata for Pack Tactics.

socialEffect.notes: The summoned Bestial Spirit is an ally to the caster and allies, understands the caster languages, shares initiative, and follows commands.

visionLightSound.placement: manifests in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range
visionLightSound.visibleForm: Bestial Spirit resembles an animal native to the chosen Air, Land, or Water environment
visionLightSound.commandChannel: obeys verbal commands; if no command is given, it dodges and avoids danger

aiContext.prompt: Choose the Bestial Spirit environment form and arrival space; use the caster's spell attack modifier for Rend, floor(slot level / 2) Rend attacks, and Pack Tactics Advantage for Land or Water forms when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and not Incapacitated.

options.label: Air
options.summary: Summon an Air Bestial Spirit with 20 base hit points, 60-foot fly speed, and Flyby.
options.notes: The summoned creature still uses the Bestial Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Land
options.summary: Summon a Land Bestial Spirit with 30 base hit points, 30-foot climb speed, and Pack Tactics.
options.notes: The summoned creature still uses the Bestial Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Water
options.summary: Summon a Water Bestial Spirit with 30 base hit points, 30-foot swim speed, Pack Tactics, and underwater breathing.
options.notes: The summoned creature still uses the Bestial Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

modeChoice.notes: The freeform animal resemblance is cosmetic; this mode choice captures the mechanical Air, Land, or Water form.

description: You call forth a bestial spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the Bestial Spirit stat block. When you cast the spell, choose an environment: Air, Land, or Water. The creature resembles an animal of your choice that is native to the chosen environment, which determines certain details in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block. Small Beast, Neutral AC 11 + the spell's level HP 20 (Air only) or 30 (Land and Water only) + 5 for each spell level above 2 Speed 30 ft.; Climb 30 ft. (Land only); Fly 60 ft. (Air only); Swim 30 ft. (Water only) Senses Darkvision 60 ft.; Passive Perception 12 Languages Understands the languages you know CR None (XP 0; PB equals your Proficiency Bonus) Flyby (Air Only). The spirit doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach. Pack Tactics (Land and Water Only). The spirit has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the spirit's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition. Water Breathing (Water Only). The spirit can breathe only underwater. Multiattack. The spirit makes a number of Rend attacks equal to half this spell's level (round down). Rend. Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 4 + the spell's level Piercing damage.
